summary.title: Add Omnipod (Omni) pump support
changes: Trio adds the OmnipodKit submodule so Omnipod (Omni) pump support is included.
A new "All Omnipod Types" option appears in pump selection and setup screens.
Trio records Omnipod pod details such as expiration time and reservoir level for monitoring.
The pump setup flow now includes an Omni setup option to start pairing and configuring Omnipod pumps.
